sigma_px_0216.note: σ_px uguale a DESI (R=1.69 Mpc/h su box 1000 Mpc/h)

sigma_px_0640.note: σ_px canonico mock (R=5 Mpc/h — configurazione O6-4)

sigma_px_1280.note: σ_px doppio (R=10 Mpc/h — già calcolato in O6-4)

interpretation: b2_mean_persistence è sensibile a σ_px (+8.42σ). Il concern BLOCKING 1 è sostanziale: σ_px diverso introduce bias misurabile. Il confronto DESI vs mock richiede correzione.
paper_statement: To assess the impact of grid discretization on b2_mean_persistence, we computed the statistic on 200 nwLH mock fields with three smoothing configurations: σ_px=0.216 (matching DESI, R=1.7 Mpc/h), σ_px=0.640 (canonical mock, R=5 Mpc/h), and σ_px=1.280 (R=10 Mpc/h). The difference between σ_px=0.216 and σ_px=0.640 is +0.1530 (+8.42σ_signal), above the non-dominance threshold of 0.5σ.
